name: Christmas Cappuccino
recipeInstructions:
1. In a coffee grinder, finely grind the espresso beans.
2. In a coffee maker, brew the espresso using the boiling water.
3. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the sugar and cinnamon and set aside.
4. Using a small knife, scrape the seeds from the vanilla bean into a medium saucepan.
5. Pour in the milk and scald over moderate heat for about 5 minutes.
6. Remove from heat, add chocolate and stir until melted.
7. Cover and keep warm over very low heat.
8. Divide the hot espresso into 4 cups.
9. In a blender, begin whipping half of the warm chocolate milk at low speed.
10. Gradually increase the speed to high and blend until frothy, about 1 minute.
11. Pour the chocolate milk into the cups of coffee, stir briefly, and top each serving with some of the milk froth.
12. Sprinkle the reserved cinnamon sugar on top.
13. Serve immediately with a dollop of whipped cream, if desired.
